assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning

No warning is necessary.' The per-stream table (lines 27-29) shows both streams as 'Fresh' with age 4 days against a 14-day threshold.

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 22: 'Per the skill specification, when the matrix is fresh (age < 14 days), the staleness check passes silently and triage proceeds without user interaction.' No prompts, options, or user-facing choices appear anywhere in the output.

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 31: 'No action required. Proceeding to Step 1.'
